layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column (4 columns on this page), attribute labels down the left (EIF; SP, DC, JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Transaction; Value of Asset A-L + Spouse/DC; Type of Income; Amount of Income A-K + Spouse/DC). Selections are black-filled cells. Footer group label: 'MS Areco'. Single Amount of Income block on this page. The 'SP, DC, JT' owner row and the Transaction row are continuous black bands across all four asset columns (no letters visible) - recorded as null and flagged. The EIF cell is black-filled for the York Credit Opportunities Fund column only.
